name: Apptopia
description: Mobile app competitive intelligence platform with SDK intelligence, tech-stack insights, downloads and monetization estimates.

seo.title: Apptopia — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Apptopia: Mobile app competitive intelligence platform with SDK intelligence, tech-stack insights, downloads and monetization estimates.

when_to_use: SDK intelligence to identify which analytics or ad tools competitors use
Download and revenue estimation for competitor app portfolio analysis
Tech stack analysis for sales prospecting into mobile app companies
Competitive intelligence on mobile app monetization strategy shifts

pros: Rich competitive SDK, downloads and revenue estimates
Useful for investor, BD and product research
Historical store data goes back years
cons: Not an MMP — no install attribution for your own app
Enterprise pricing steep for small teams
Accuracy of revenue estimates varies by vertical
review.verdict: Top-tier competitive intel for app markets, but miscategorized — it does not do real attribution.
review.best_for: BD, investor and competitive-research teams tracking rival app SDKs and downloads.
review.not_for: Marketers needing actual MMP install attribution and postbacks.
